title: Critic verdict (AO3_tests)
description: Machine-checkable structure for a critic (Opus) review verdict. Emitted as the last fenced ```json block in the critic's final message. Validated by scripts/critic_verdict_check.py (rules are hardcoded there; this file is the reference schema, checked for drift by scripts/tests/test_critic_verdict_check.py). Port of D:\Improving_AI\Operating-System-for-LLMs tools/critic_verdict.schema.json, task os-port-0722, with a deliberate adaptation: the 'verdict' enum is Russian, verbatim from .claude/agents/critic.md rule 6, instead of the OS original's English fit/fit_with_fixes/blocker -- avoiding a two-dictionary drift between the agent prompt's own wording and the machine schema.

verdict.description: ПРИНЯТЬ = accept, ДОРАБОТАТЬ = needs fixes, ОТКЛОНИТЬ = reject. Verbatim dictionary of .claude/agents/critic.md rule 6.

blockers.description: Blocking findings. Empty when verdict is ПРИНЯТЬ; non-empty when verdict is ОТКЛОНИТЬ.

class_completeness.description: Answer on class completeness of the fix per docs/SIBLING_MAP.md (D-0043).

reruns.description: Control reruns of the mechanical layer (D-0046).

fixes.description: Required and non-empty when verdict is ДОРАБОТАТЬ; optional otherwise.
